## Summary / 摘要

<!-- Briefly describe what changed and why. / 简述改动与原因。 -->

## Type of change / 变更类型

- [ ] Bug fix / 缺陷修复
- [ ] New feature / 新功能
- [ ] Documentation / 文档
- [ ] Tests / 测试
- [ ] Other / 其他：

## Contributor licensing / 贡献许可（必选）

Please read [`CONTRIBUTING_LICENSE.md`](../CONTRIBUTING_LICENSE.md) before submitting.

- [ ] **I confirm I have the legal right to submit this contribution.** / 我确认有权提交本贡献。
- [ ] **Software changes** (`.py`, build scripts, etc.) are licensed under **AGPL-3.0-or-later**, consistent with [`LICENSE`](../LICENSE) and [`NOTICE`](../NOTICE). / 软件类改动按 **AGPL-3.0-or-later** 授权。
- [ ] **Narrative docs / manuscripts / figures** under `papers_final/` or `docs/` are compatible with **CC BY-NC-ND 4.0** (see [`LICENSE-DOCS.md`](../LICENSE-DOCS.md)), or the file explicitly states another license. / 叙事文档/论文稿/图谱与 **CC BY-NC-ND 4.0** 兼容，或文件内已声明其他许可。
- [ ] **No third-party material** was included without proper license or permission. / 未夹带未获授权的第三方材料。

## Provenance / 来源（若涉及第三方内容请说明）

<!-- If you copied or adapted external content, cite source + license. / 若有引用或改编外部内容，请注明来源与许可。 -->

## Checklist / 自检

- [ ] I ran relevant tests / scripts locally (if applicable). / 已在本地运行相关测试或脚本（如适用）。
- [ ] I updated docs if user-facing behavior changed. / 若影响对外行为，已更新文档。

## Optional: DCO sign-off / 可选签署

If you agree, add to the last commit message:

`Signed-off-by: Your Name <email@example.com>`
